name: Moderna
notes: Market cap ~$20B (est., web, May 2026). Kendall Square flagship.

name: Vertex Pharmaceuticals
notes: Market cap ~$114B (est., web, May 2026). Seaport / Fan Pier HQ.

name: Takeda (US hub)
notes: Japanese parent (TSE/NYSE: TAK); Cambridge is the US/global oncology hub.

name: Sanofi (US R&D hub)
notes: French parent (SNY); ~915k sq ft Cambridge Crossing campus (Genzyme legacy). Acquired Blueprint Medicines (closed Jul 2025).

name: Foundation Medicine
notes: Roche subsidiary. Consolidated ~1,100 MA staff into new Seaport HQ (2024).

name: bluebird bio
notes: Taken private by Carlyle / SK Capital (closed Jun 2025). Assembly Row HQ.

name: Boston Scientific
notes: Market cap ~$71B (est., web, Jun 2026). Cardio / interventional devices.

name: Thermo Fisher Scientific
notes: Market cap ~$177B (est., web, Jun 2026). Tools + PPD + Patheon.

name: Hologic
notes: Market cap ~$17B (est., web, Apr 2026). Panther dx, breast health.

name: Abiomed
notes: J&J MedTech subsidiary (acq. 2022). Impella heart pumps.

name: athenahealth
notes: ~$17B take-private (Bain/Hellman & Friedman, 2022) (est.). Moved HQ from Watertown to Boston Landing.

name: Nuance Communications
notes: Microsoft subsidiary (acq. ~$19.7B, 2022). Dragon / DAX ambient AI.

name: HealthEdge
notes: Payer software suite (HealthRules, Wellframe, GuidingCare). Blackstone-backed.

name: Firefly Health
notes: Virtual-first primary care + health plan. Watertown HQ (Arsenal area).

name: Kyruus Health
notes: Provider data / patient access (merged with HealthSparq).
